requirement_topic.en: SIE / Distributor Grid Connection for BESS — 60 Hz / 120-240 V System, IEC 62933, and Distributor Interconnection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: SIE / 配电公司BESS并网——60 Hz / 120-240 V系统、IEC 62933及配电公司互联要求
requirement_topic.zht: SIE / 配電公司BESS併網——60 Hz / 120-240 V系統、IEC 62933及配電公司互聯要求

summary.en: The Dominican Republic's electricity sector is regulated by the Superintendencia de Electricidad (SIE), which oversees generation, transmission, distribution, and interconnection approvals. The Comisión Nacional de Energía (CNE) sets energy policy including renewables and storage. Three distribution companies serve distinct geographic zones: EDENORTE (northern region), EDESUR (southern region), and EDEESTE (eastern region). All grid-connected BESS installations — whether utility-scale or commercial and industrial (C&I) behind-the-meter — require SIE regulatory authorisation and distributor interconnection approval from the relevant distribution company. The Dominican Republic's grid operates at 60 Hz, 120/240 V (single-phase residential and light commercial) and 120/208 V or 277/480 V (three-phase commercial and industrial). BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be designed, firmware-configured, and validated for Dominican Republic's 60 Hz grid before interconnection testing and commissioning. IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards, including IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems), are referenced in international project specifications and may be required by SIE or project owners. Storage is a growing sector driven by the need for island grid frequency regulation, peak shaving for C&I customers, and integration of solar PV capacity. A publicly accessible SIE or distributor technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection requirements must be obtained directly from SIE and the relevant distribution company.
summary.zh: 多米尼加共和国电力行业由电力监管局（SIE）负责监管，负责发电、输电、配电及互联批准。国家能源委员会（CNE）制定包括可再生能源和储能在内的能源政策。三家配电公司各自服务不同地理区域：EDENORTE（北部地区）、EDESUR（南部地区）和EDEESTE（东部地区）。所有并网BESS装置——无论是公用事业规模还是工商业（C&I）表后项目——均须取得SIE监管授权和相关配电公司的互联批准。多米尼加共和国电网运行参数为60 Hz、120/240 V（单相住宅及轻型商业）和120/208 V或277/480 V（三相商业及工业）。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须针对多米尼加共和国60 Hz电网进行设计、固件配置和验证，然后方可进行互联测试和调试。IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准，包括IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求），在国际项目规格中被引用，并可能由SIE或项目业主要求提供。储能是一个增长中的行业，受岛屿电网频率调节需求、工商业用户削峰需求及太阳能光伏装机整合需求驱动。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认SIE或配电公司公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网要求须直接向SIE和相关配电公司获取。
summary.zht: 多明尼加共和國電力行業由電力監管局（SIE）負責監管，負責發電、輸電、配電及互聯批准。國家能源委員會（CNE）制定包括可再生能源和儲能在內的能源政策。三家配電公司各自服務不同地理區域：EDENORTE（北部地區）、EDESUR（南部地區）和EDEESTE（東部地區）。所有併網BESS裝置——無論是公用事業規模還是工商業（C&I）表後項目——均須取得SIE監管授權和相關配電公司的互聯批准。多明尼加共和國電網運行參數為60 Hz、120/240 V（單相住宅及輕型商業）和120/208 V或277/480 V（三相商業及工業）。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須針對多明尼加共和國60 Hz電網進行設計、韌體配置和驗證，然後方可進行互聯測試和調試。IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準，包括IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求），在國際項目規格中被引用，並可能由SIE或項目業主要求提供。儲能是一個增長中的行業，受島嶼電網頻率調節需求、工商業用戶削峰需求及太陽能光伏裝機整合需求驅動。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認SIE或配電公司公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網要求須直接向SIE和相關配電公司獲取。

standards_or_laws: SIE (Superintendencia de Electricidad) — regulatory authority for grid connection and electricity market access in the Dominican Republic; interconnection approval required for all grid-connected BESS
CNE (Comisión Nacional de Energía) — national energy policy authority; authorisation required for renewable energy and storage projects
EDENORTE / EDESUR / EDEESTE — distribution company interconnection approval required depending on project location
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Dominican Republic grid parameters: 60 Hz, 120/240 V single-phase, 120/208 V or 277/480 V three-phase

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). This is fundamentally different from the Dominican Republic's 60 Hz, 120/240 V grid. PCS firmware, protection relay settings, frequency ride-through parameters, and voltage protection thresholds configured for China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid must be completely reconfigured and revalidated for Dominican Republic's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid conditions before interconnection testing and commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。这与多米尼加共和国60 Hz、120/240 V电网存在根本差异。针对中国50 Hz / 220-380 V电网配置的PCS固件、保护继电器设置、频率穿越参数和电压保护阈值，须在互联测试和调试前完全重新配置并针对多米尼加共和国60 Hz / 120-240 V电网条件重新验证。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。這與多明尼加共和國60 Hz、120/240 V電網存在根本差異。針對中國50 Hz / 220-380 V電網配置的PCS韌體、保護繼電器設定、頻率穿越參數和電壓保護閾值，須在互聯測試和調試前完全重新配置並針對多明尼加共和國60 Hz / 120-240 V電網條件重新驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; 50 Hz-based, not equivalent for Dominican Republic 60 Hz grid)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network; 50 Hz-based)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters; 50 Hz-based)

gap.en: Critical gap: The Dominican Republic's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid is fundamentally incompatible with Chinese BESS PCS configured and validated for China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid. PCS firmware reconfiguration is REQUIRED and must be treated as a mandatory engineering step, not an optional adjustment. Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy SIE or distributor interconnection requirements. Key actions required: (a) PCS firmware and protection parameter reconfiguration for 60 Hz, 120/240 V — including frequency ride-through thresholds, voltage protection levels, anti-islanding settings, and reactive power control parameters; (b) revalidation and retesting of reconfigured PCS to confirm performance at Dominican Republic grid conditions; (c) engage SIE and the relevant distributor (EDENORTE, EDESUR, or EDEESTE) at the earliest project stage to obtain interconnection technical requirements and application procedures; (d) obtain CNE project authorisation under Dominican Republic renewable energy and storage regulations; (e) where project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly — Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (f) confirm SCADA and communication interface protocol required by SIE or the distributor for BESS monitoring.
gap.zh: 关键差距：多米尼加共和国60 Hz / 120-240 V电网与针对中国50 Hz / 220-380 V电网配置和验证的中国BESS PCS存在根本不兼容。PCS固件重新配置是必须执行的步骤，须作为强制工程措施，而非可选调整。中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足SIE或配电公司互联要求。所需关键措施：（a）针对60 Hz、120/240 V重新配置PCS固件和保护参数——包括频率穿越阈值、电压保护等级、防孤岛设置和无功功率控制参数；（b）对重新配置的PCS进行重新验证和重新测试，以确认在多米尼加共和国电网条件下的性能；（c）在项目最早阶段与SIE和相关配电公司（EDENORTE、EDESUR或EDEESTE）接触，获取互联技术要求和申请程序；（d）依据多米尼加共和国可再生能源和储能法规取得CNE项目授权；（e）若项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件——中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（f）确认SIE或配电公司对BESS监控所要求的SCADA和通信接口协议。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：多明尼加共和國60 Hz / 120-240 V電網與針對中國50 Hz / 220-380 V電網配置和驗證的中國BESS PCS存在根本不兼容。PCS韌體重新配置是必須執行的步驟，須作為強制工程措施，而非可選調整。中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足SIE或配電公司互聯要求。所需關鍵措施：（a）針對60 Hz、120/240 V重新配置PCS韌體和保護參數——包括頻率穿越閾值、電壓保護等級、防孤島設定和無功功率控制參數；（b）對重新配置的PCS進行重新驗證和重新測試，以確認在多明尼加共和國電網條件下的性能；（c）在項目最早階段與SIE和相關配電公司（EDENORTE、EDESUR或EDEESTE）接觸，獲取互聯技術要求和申請程序；（d）依據多明尼加共和國可再生能源和儲能法規取得CNE項目授權；（e）若項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件——中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（f）確認SIE或配電公司對BESS監控所要求的SCADA和通訊接口協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SIE authorisation and distributor interconnection approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in the Dominican Republic; PCS reconfiguration for 60 Hz / 120-240 V is a required engineering step; technical requirements are project-specific and must be obtained directly from SIE and the relevant distributor
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; 50 Hz-based standards and approvals are not transferable to the Dominican Republic's 60 Hz grid

source.publisher: SIE — Superintendencia de Electricidad (Dominican Republic electricity regulator)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Dominican Republic SIE or distributor interconnection requirements. BESS PCS firmware reconfiguration from 50 Hz / 220-380 V to 60 Hz / 120-240 V is REQUIRED and must be completed before interconnection testing. Engage SIE, the relevant distributor (EDENORTE, EDESUR, or EDEESTE), and CNE at the earliest project stage to determine interconnection technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and communication protocol specifications. No publicly accessible SIE or distributor technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct regulatory engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足多米尼加共和国SIE或配电公司互联要求。BESS PCS固件从50 Hz / 220-380 V重新配置为60 Hz / 120-240 V是必须完成的步骤，须在互联测试前完成。应在项目最早阶段与SIE、相关配电公司（EDENORTE、EDESUR或EDEESTE）及CNE接触，确定互联技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及通信协议规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认SIE或配电公司公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与监管机构接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足多明尼加共和國SIE或配電公司互聯要求。BESS PCS韌體從50 Hz / 220-380 V重新配置為60 Hz / 120-240 V是必須完成的步驟，須在互聯測試前完成。應在項目最早階段與SIE、相關配電公司（EDENORTE、EDESUR或EDEESTE）及CNE接觸，確定互聯技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及通訊協議規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認SIE或配電公司公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與監管機構接觸至關重要。
